objective: Acquire first 20 paying clients across audit, sprint, and retainer offers with CAC payback in 60 days or less.

experiments.target_audience: High-intent founders and RevOps operators searching for lead-to-close conversion fixes.
experiments.kill_rule: Pause when CTR < 2% after 1,000 impressions or CPL > $250 for 7 days.
experiments.scale_rule: Increase weekly budget by 20% when CPL <= $120 and close rate >= 20%.
experiments.notes: Primary CTA maps to Revenue Leak Audit ($500) and escalates qualified buyers to sprint and retainer offers.

experiments.target_audience: COO, Sales, and RevOps leaders in 5-200 employee B2B companies with active traffic but weak appointment rates.
experiments.kill_rule: Pause sequence when reply rate < 1.5% after 1,000 sends.
experiments.scale_rule: Expand list volume 25% weekly when reply rate >= 5% and demo rate >= 0.5%.
experiments.notes: Outbound sequence focuses on the 14-day Booked-Call Engine Sprint for teams with underperforming inbound and follow-up motion.

experiments.target_audience: Agencies and consultants with client portfolios that need monthly growth automation operations.
experiments.kill_rule: Pause partner lane after 45 days with zero referred demos.
experiments.scale_rule: Add one new partner each week once two consecutive weeks hit >= 3 referred demos.
experiments.notes: Partner lane anchors on Revenue Ops Pod monthly retainers for recurring MRR growth.
